full_text:
Jiang He 姜合
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jiang He (姜合)was born in Wudu. Learned in esoteric topics, he predicted Wei would rule the world. Jiang He was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Jiang He lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
